description: The Seam's structural nets - mechanism at the discipline-decay points (docs/2026-07-11-seam-design.md). SessionStart serves the first-of-day card (direct-sqlite fallback, works without the server). Stop runs a ONE-per-session capture sweep via the decision-block contract. NOTE: PreCompact has no model-visible hook channel, so the pre-compaction MORTALITY sweep lives in the topics-capture skill's threshold rule, not here (audit 2026-07-11).
